author: y4rr
content: ferrotorch-gpu wave committed as single comprehensive commit 26f881b3. 15 files changed, 5588 insertions, 452 deletions. Branch is 12 commits ahead of origin/main. cargo build --workspace PASS at HEAD. Commit body enumerates all 7 dispatches (gpu-A foundation + gpu-B/C/D1/D2/E SAFETY × 227 + gpu-C-extension #704+#705 closures + gpu-F §3 opt-in migration). Closes #701, #704, #705, #706. Tracked follow-ups: #702, #703, #707, #708, #709. The single-commit decision was pragmatic: kernels.rs and tensor_bridge.rs have multi-dispatch interleaved edits that are difficult to split without git add -p (interactive in non-interactive session). Conceptually unified ('close ferrotorch-gpu audit response') so single commit reads cleanly.
